title: Dividend Growth Checkup - 2022
text: Analyzing my real-life portfolio's dividend growth for 2022. Dividend growth pulled back some compared to 2021; however, it was still a strong year of dividend growth.

title: Own The Toll Booths - Part 2
text: Previously, I wrote an article on "toll booth" investments and identified a few examples of companies that operate as such. In this second installment, I will highlight a few more companies that fit this description and look at their historical performance.

title: ICE Launches Carbon-Neutral U.S. Electricity Futures Index
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc., a leading global provider of data, technology and market infrastructure, today announced the launch of the first carbon-neutral U.S. electricity futures index. With the market focused on the build out of North American renewable generation and its impact on U.S. power prices, the ICE U.S. Carbon Neutral Power Index provides investors with a benchmark that contains exposure to the critical North American power markets.

title: These 3 Stock Exchanges Stand to Benefit From SEC Trading Reforms

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio - Final 2022 Recap
text: 2022 was another fantastic year for dividend growth, with my income increasing by over 13%. I recount every sale made during the year and the replacement purchases.
